issues.description: Condition should check LeaderHasType 'Baroque Works', not HasCardOnBoard 'Leader'. The effect triggers if your Leader's type includes 'Baroque Works'.

SearchDeck action is incomplete. Must specify: (1) look at top 4 cards, (2) reveal up to 1 'Baroque Works' card excluding 'Miss.Valentine(Mikita)', (3) add to hand, (4) trash the rest. Current DSL only searches by name 'Baroque Works', which is incorrect.

DSL structure cannot properly express the complex search: 'look at 4 cards, filter by type containing Baroque Works (excluding Miss.Valentine), choose up to 1, add to hand, trash rest'. Standard SearchDeck action is insufficient for this multi-step conditional logic.
